label: Bioactivity Filter (Non-Target)
description: Predicts IC50 values of lead compounds against the non-target protein (RPS6KB2). High IC50 values relative to RPS6KB1 confirm selectivity.

defaultInputs.name: Compound List
defaultInputs.tooltip: Compounds from the non-target docking step.

defaultOutputs.name: Predicted pIC50 for RPS6KB2 - CHEMBL2424239
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Predicted pIC50 against RPS6KB2 — lower values vs RPS6KB1 confirm selectivity.

configSchema.label: Non-Target Docking List
configSchema.tooltip: Compound-target docking data from the non-target docking step.

configSchema.label: Prediction Model
configSchema.tooltip: Bioactivity prediction model for the non-target selectivity assessment.
